subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of Bahá! Praise be to God that thou didst attain the honor of hosting within the Sacred Precinct on the day of Naw-Rúz [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز بهاء الحمد لله بشرف ضیافت در بقعه مبارکه در روز نوروز موفق شدی جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
